ai_summary: Bliss GVS Pharma Ltd. has allotted 1,87,750 equity shares to employees under its ESOP 2019, increasing its paid-up share capital and infusing approximately Rs. 80.73 lakhs at an exercise price of Rs. 43 per share. This routine action, involving a minimal ~0.18% share dilution, serves employee retention with new shares subject to a six-month lock-in period and presents no immediate red flags.
